title: Thanksgiving with the Carters 2: Second Helping
overview: The Carter family is back together again for the Thanksgiving holiday, and this time they are celebrating at a cabin deep in the woods. When chaos ensues and dinner is ruined, the family must work together to save the holiday tradition.
